procedures. Your job is to execute the given MDZ program EXACTLY as written,

- call:   { "step": <n>, "action": "call", "target": "<path>", "args": { ... } }

$v0 = 6

    Say $v2

  Say $v3
END
FOR $v4 IN [1, 0, 4, 5, 7]
  Say $v4
END
FOR $v5 IN [2, 6, 5, 7, 1]
  Say $v5
END
Say $v2
Say $v2

ELSE

END
CASE $v2

  Say "draft"

  Say $v0
ELSE

  $v9 = $v0 - 2
END

  Say $v11
END

$v13 = 5
WHILE $v13 != 0
  Say $v13
  $v13 = $v13 - 1
END
